description.unified: Leaps and deals Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for [1 sec->2sec].
Deals Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by 25% and ATK Spd by [65%->20%] for 4sec. [(removed) reduces their Physical Defense by 30%]
For [7 sec->14sec], increases all allies' Physical DEF, Physical Block Chance by [200->150], and reduces Physical DMG taken by [35%->10%].
On Block, deals Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [10%->3.5%] for [5 sec->6sec], and increases your Physical DEF by [5%->9%]. These effects stack up to [5->4] times.

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [1 sec->2 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec. [(removed) Increases Physical Damage taken by the target by 30% for 4 sec.]

dark.unified: After knockback, stuns the target for 1 sec. [(removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.]

light.unified: Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%. [(removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.]

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 100. [(removed) Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400.]

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times. [(removed) Attack reduction effect changed to apply 2 stacks.]

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) Every 10 sec, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec.]

description.unified: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by [2 sec->1 sec].
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by [30%->25%] and their P.Crit Resist by [???->210] for 4 sec.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [{0}%->{0}%] of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by [???->3 sec].
